title: Requesting a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, start by logging into the company IT portal using your employee credentials. Navigate to the 'Hardware Requests' section and fill out the request form, specifying the type of hardware you need and the reason for the request. Once submitted, your request will be reviewed by the IT department for approval. You will receive an email notification regarding the status of your request within 3-5 business days. If approved, the IT department will coordinate with you for the delivery or setup of the new equipment. For urgent requests, please contact the IT helpdesk directly to expedite the process.
